meta.description: Vanshavali of the Gautam lineage from Ghurehata village, Mauganj, Rewa, Madhya Pradesh. This tree traces our lineage from the great sage Maharishi Gautam to the present generation.
meta.disclaimerHindi: इस वंशावली में प्रस्तुत जानकारी रखरखावकर्ता के सर्वोत्तम ज्ञान के आधार पर संकलित की गई है, जो मौखिक इतिहास, पारिवारिक अभिलेखों और व्यक्तिगत शोध पर आधारित है। यह केवल व्यक्तिगत, पारिवारिक एवं वंशावली संदर्भ हेतु है। रखरखावकर्ता सभी अभिलेखों की पूर्णता या पूर्ण सटीकता की कोई गारंटी नहीं देता। स्वतंत्र सत्यापन के बिना इस दस्तावेज़ के किसी भी भाग का उपयोग किसी कानूनी, व्यावसायिक या आधिकारिक उद्देश्य के लिए नहीं किया जाना चाहिए।
meta.disclaimer: The information presented in this Vanshavali is compiled to the best of the maintainer's knowledge, based on oral histories, family records, and personal research. It is intended solely for personal, family, and genealogical reference. The maintainer does not guarantee the completeness or absolute accuracy of all records. No part of this document should be used for any legal, commercial, or official purpose without independent verification.

people.name: श्री हृदयी राम
people.bio: Patriarch of the modern Gautam family branch in Ghurehata. Came from Khadra deeh from UP.

people.name: श्रीमती परदाई
people.bio: Please fill in the actual name and details.

people.name: श्रीमती कोयली देवी
people.bio: Hails from Baghaun(Known for first white tiger 'Mohan'), Sidhi; Daughter from Pandey Pariwar

people.name: श्री लक्ष्मण प्रसाद
people.bio: Respected elder of the Gautam family. Served in the Public Works Department as Mistri. A key source and verifier of family history and lineage information.

people.name: श्रीमती लाला / रामवती
people.bio: Please fill in the actual name and details.

people.name: श्री यज्ञ नारायण गौतम
people.bio: Served as Deputy Ranger in the Forest Department. A respected member of the family and key source of genealogical information for the Gautam dynasty records.

people.name: श्री अम्बिका प्रसाद गौतम
people.bio: Member of the Gautam family. Contributed to verifying and preserving family history records.

people.name: श्री केशरी प्रसाद गौतम
people.dom: WED 10 May 1978 (Marriage: Akshaya Tritiya 1978, द्विरागवन/गवन: Akshaya Tritiya 1980 / FRIDAY 18 APRIL 1980)
people.bio: Served as Captain in the Indian Army. A distinguished member of the Gautam family who contributed to verifying the family lineage records.

people.name: श्रीमती प्रफुल्ला देवी गौतम
people.dom: WED 10 May 1978 (Marriage: Akshaya Tritiya 1978, द्विरागवन/गवन: Akshaya Tritiya 1980 / FRIDAY 18 APRIL 1980)
people.bio: Served home with 6 children.

people.name: श्री नित्य नारायण (आशुतोष)
people.bio: Author and maintainer of the Gautam Dynasty blog (gautamdynasty.blogspot.com). Dedicated to documenting and preserving the Gautam family lineage for future generations. Self-described as 'a seeker'.

people.name: आदर्श मिश्र (भूपे)
people.bio: Served in the Indian Army's Education Core. Known for his dedication to education and mentorship, earning him the nickname 'MasterJi' (मास्टरजी). A respected member of the Gautam family who contributes to preserving family history and lineage information.

people.name: श्री शोभनाथ
people.bio: Son from first wife of श्री नन्द किशोर.

people.name: इन्द्रसेन
people.bio: (-1) Son of शम्भू

people.name: श्री राम प्रगास
people.bio: Son from first wife of श्री नन्द किशोर.

people.name: श्री चंद्रमणि
people.bio: Son from second wife of श्री नन्द किशोर.

people.name: संजय
people.bio: Also known as चिकने.

people.name: रघुनाथ
people.bio: Also known as DADDI.

people.name: श्री विश्वनाथ
people.bio: Son from second wife of श्री नन्द किशोर.

people.name: पार्थ
people.bio: Also known as प्रियांश.

people.name: प्रज्ञान
people.bio: Also known as शिवांश.

people.name: श्री बैजनाथ
people.bio: Son from second wife of श्री नन्द किशोर.

people.name: शिवशंकर
people.bio: Also known as नन्हू.
